steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify all dependencies (t0001_stt_benchmark, t0004_vocabulary_biasing_experiment) are completed.

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Create task folder structure, logs, and initialize assets directories.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Design the benchmark execution plan, estimate timelines, and identify data requirements.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Run Moonshine v2 Medium on gold-92 clips, compute metrics, assess shallow-fusion feasibility.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write results_summary.md, results_detailed.md, metrics.json with all registered metrics and comparisons vs. Whisper baseline.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Compare Moonshine v2 results against published results and alternative STT models.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Generate suggestions for follow-up research and optimization paths.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Final verification pass, run all verificators, and prepare for merge.

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: SKIPPED — No relevant papers in corpus for STT shallow-fusion benchmarking beyond t0004 and t0005.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: SKIPPED — Task scope is limited to benchmarking and feasibility assessment; sufficient domain knowledge from t0004 and t0005.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: SKIPPED — Task does not require research into prior task code; uses t0004 predictions and t0001 benchmark data directly.

steps.name: setup-machines
steps.description: SKIPPED — All computation runs on local CPU; no remote machines required.

steps.name: teardown
steps.description: SKIPPED — No remote machines to tear down.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: SKIPPED — Task scope is well-defined; creative alternatives addressed in planning phase.
